title: How Lovart Works
content:
Lovart is an AI design agent that turns your ideas into polished creative design (product shots, social posts, marketing campaign kits, brand videos, and more) in minutes.

Most design products give you tools. Lovart gives you finished outcomes. You describe what you need, and Lovart handles the end-to-end creative process: picking models, generating assets, and editing assets with AI, so you get production-ready files fast and easy.

You work with Lovart the way you'd work with a designer:

If you're producing a common output (an Instagram post, a YouTube thumbnail, a product listing, a video ad) but don't know or don't want to prompt, you can start with our one-click Skills.

Lovart Skills are intelligent workflows tuned for specific creative tasks. When you pick a Skill, the Agent knows what it needs to produce, asks you for anything missing, and moves through the steps automatically to deliver a finished output. Unlike a free-form prompt, a Skill encodes prompt best practices, professional design guidelines, and multi-step chains, so you can follow the Agent's lead.

Available Skill Categories

Jump to Lovart Skills for a full feature description.
